ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing unit record */,
  "line_type" TEXT /* Type of line representing data aggregation */,
  "tenure" TEXT /* Tenure type of the housing unit (e.g., Owner occupied) */,
  "housing_problem" TEXT /* Category of housing problems faced (if any) */,
  "household_income" TEXT /* Household income level classification */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the housing unit */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the housing unit is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the housing unit is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the housing unit */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the housing unit was built */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the housing unit */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Property value of the housing unit */,
  "rent" REAL /* Rent amount for renter-occupied units */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the housing unit */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the housing unit */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the lot in square feet */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the last inspection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the housing unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_line_type FOREIGN KEY ("line_type") REFERENCES tenure_types ("tenure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_housing_problem FOREIGN KEY ("housing_problem") REFERENCES housing_problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_units_household_income FOREIGN KEY ("household_income") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level category */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Name of the income level (e.g., Low Income, Middle Income) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income level and its criteria */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the income level in dollars */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the income level in dollars */,
  "area_median_income" REAL /* Median income for the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing problem */,
  "problem_description" TEXT /* Description of the housing problem (e.g., overcrowding, cost burden) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the housing problem (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "suggested_action" TEXT /* Suggested actions to address the housing problem */,
  "cost_estimate" REAL /* Estimated cost to resolve the housing problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tenure_types" (
  "tenure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tenure type */,
  "tenure_type" TEXT /* Type of tenure (e.g., Owner occupied, Renter occupied) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tenure type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tenure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "total_units" INTEGER /* Total number of occupied housing units */,
  "owner_occupied" INTEGER /* Count of owner-occupied units */,
  "renter_occupied" INTEGER /* Count of renter-occupied units */,
  "housing_problems_count" INTEGER /* Count of units facing one or more housing problems */,
  "average_property_value" REAL /* Average property value of the housing units */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent for renter-occupied units */,
  "average_household_income" REAL /* Average household income */,
  "date_generated" TEXT /* Date when the summary was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Affordability, Occupancy) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is public or private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., percentage of cost-burdened households) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area for which the metric is recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data for the metric */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)
